responses.Section 4.2: KYC pass criteria require DVS result of PASS; DATA_MISMATCH is a hard stop.
responses.Section 5.1: Fraud indicators include unverifiable employer, pattern-matched deposits, or synthetic identity signals.
responses.Section 5.2: Synthetic identity indicators require fraud hold and escalation.
responses.Section 6: Credit decision policy: LVR, DTI, and score thresholds apply.
responses.Section 6.2: Income shading: bonus at 50%; self-employed uses 2-year average with add-backs.
responses.Section 7.4: Hardship assistance must be assessed within 21 days of application receipt.
responses.Section 8.1: DPD framework defines required collections actions by arrears bucket.
responses.Section 9.1: NCCP Act responsible lending obligations for hardship and collections.
